name: Skeleton Village
short_description: Old dilapidated houses, crumbling planks, an old moldy well, an oppressive atmosphere and limited space. The walls erected around the perimeter put pressure on the nerves.
detailed_description:
Old dilapidated houses, crumbling planks, an old moldy well, an oppressive atmosphere and limited space.
The walls erected around the perimeter put pressure on the nerves.

You find yourself in a camp surrounded by armed skeleton guards. The exit is blocked.
You need to find the key before it's time for dinner. And dinner is you!

The key can be hidden anywhere. The locals are reluctant to communicate with you.
Explore the camp. Be smart. Check every nook and cranny.
Find a way out and get away from these bony cannibals.
